capabilities.proposed_gate: data-source contract + runtime boundary amendment + capture work-unit human approval
data-source contract + runtime boundary amendment; independent of realtime approval
event + delivery contract; each external channel a separate human approval
source + privacy + persistence approval; news ingestion and cloud sync approved separately
simulation contract + credential boundary + order-authority gate; two independent human approvals
separate 7B contract, capability matrix, credential boundary, egress policy, acceptance package

explicitly_out_of_scope.note: Remains prohibited. No order route, command, or UI control is proposed or authorized by this document.

acceptance_notes: This evidence records a proposal document only; no capability is implemented or activated.
All four P4 deferred rows are covered item by item; realtime and delayed feeds are split from their shared P4 row for separate approval.
The 7B general provider runtime is included per the P5 amendment's provider_capability_not_active status.
Automatic order placement remains prohibited and is explicitly out of scope.
Every capability activation requires human approval (human gate) of its own contracts before any work-unit, egress, or implementation begins.
The approved P4 boundary document is unchanged by this proposal.
